original_image_tags: A pinkish-red paper routing slip or teletype receipt with typed text and three ink stamps. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top. The typed text is faded and appears to be a carbon copy or impression from the reverse side, reading from right-to-left and appearing mirrored.

elements.description: Pink paper document showing reverse-side text and multiple stamps. Contains three stamped annotations: 'RECEIVED Aug 15 9 31 AM '47 INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.', 'RECEIVED Aug 14 9 20 PM '47 F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', and a third inverted 'RECEIVED' stamp at bottom left. Faint reversed text from the document's front side is visible through the paper. Two punched holes at the top edge.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the pink paper, two hole-punches, three stamps, and reversed/mirrored text, but B provides specific stamped text content that A does not quote, creating an omission rather than a contradiction.
